In [1]:
# ============================================================
# 信贷额度调整机制分析 v5 — 完整增强版（最小改动修正版）
# ============================================================
# 修正：
#   - 修复重复用户统计 reset_index 列名冲突报错
#   - plt 使用英文保底字体，不依赖中文字体
#   - 修复 forest plot 的 errorbar 颜色列表报错
#   - 增加 safe_qcut，避免 qcut+labels+duplicates 报错
#   - bootstrap / AUC / OOF / confusion matrix 更稳健
#   - 修复局部 CATE 中 risk_q5 误用 FEATURES[0] 的问题
#   - 改善 xgboost 的 GPU/CPU 兼容
#   - 修复 DML / same-only model 在单类训练折上的 XGBoostError
# ============================================================

# %% Cell 0 — Imports
import os
import gc
import warnings
import time
import sys
import math

import numpy as np
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.gridspec as gridspec
from IPython.display import display, Markdown
from numpy.linalg import lstsq

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")

from sklearn.model_selection import StratifiedKFold, cross_val_predict
from sklearn.metrics import (
    roc_auc_score, log_loss, f1_score,
    confusion_matrix, classification_report,
    brier_score_loss, average_precision_score
)
from sklearn.impute import SimpleImputer
from sklearn.neighbors import NearestNeighbors

import xgboost as xgb
from scipy import stats

# -----------------------------
# Matplotlib font setup (English fallback)
# -----------------------------
def setup_matplotlib_fonts():
    plt.rcParams["font.sans-serif"] = ["DejaVu Sans"]
    plt.rcParams["axes.unicode_minus"] = False
    plt.rcParams["figure.dpi"] = 180
    plt.rcParams["font.size"] = 9
    plt.rcParams["axes.titlesize"] = 11

setup_matplotlib_fonts()

USE_ENGLISH_PLOT = True
def PT(cn, en):
    return en if USE_ENGLISH_PLOT else cn

pd.set_option("display.max_columns", 100)
pd.set_option("display.max_rows", 80)
pd.set_option("display.width", 200)
pd.set_option("display.float_format", lambda x: f"{x:.6f}")

# %% Cell 1 — Config
def safe_path(*paths):
    for p in paths:
        if p is not None and os.path.exists(p):
            return p
    return None

CFG = dict(
    data_path    = safe_path("./working_data/2wcase.csv", "/mnt/data/2wcase.csv"),
    feature_path = safe_path("./working_data/model/v5-短期.xlsx", "/mnt/data/v5-短期.xlsx"),
    seed         = 2026,
    n_splits     = 5,
    n_boot       = 500,
    use_cuda     = True,
    gpu_id       = "1",
    ps_trim      = (0.05, 0.95),
    xgb_params   = dict(
        n_estimators=400,
        max_depth=5,
        learning_rate=0.05,
        subsample=0.85,
        colsample_bytree=0.85,
        reg_lambda=1.0,
        min_child_weight=5,
        verbosity=0,
        eval_metric="logloss",
    ),
    dpi = 180,
)

assert CFG["data_path"] and CFG["feature_path"], "数据文件路径未找到"

if CFG["use_cuda"] and CFG["gpu_id"]:
    os.environ["CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES"] = str(CFG["gpu_id"])

RNG = np.random.RandomState(CFG["seed"])

# %% Cell 2 — Helpers
def log(*args):
    print(f"[{time.strftime('%H:%M:%S')}]", *args)

def section(title):
    display(Markdown(f"\n---\n## {title}\n"))

def subsection(title):
    display(Markdown(f"### {title}\n"))

def show(df, title=None, n=40):
    if title:
        display(Markdown(f"**{title}**"))
    if isinstance(df, pd.Series):
        display(df.head(n) if n and len(df) > n else df)
    else:
        display(df.head(n) if n and len(df) > n else df)

def safe_numeric(s):
    return pd.to_numeric(s, errors="coerce")

def clip_prob(p, lo=1e-6, hi=1-1e-6):
    return np.clip(np.asarray(p, dtype=float), lo, hi)

def safe_auc(y_true, y_score, **kwargs):
    y_true = np.asarray(y_true)
    y_score_arr = np.asarray(y_score)
    if y_score_arr.ndim > 1:
        mask = np.isfinite(y_true) & np.isfinite(y_score_arr).all(axis=1)
    else:
        mask = np.isfinite(y_true) & np.isfinite(y_score_arr)
    y = y_true[mask]
    if len(np.unique(y)) < 2:
        return np.nan
    return roc_auc_score(y_true[mask], y_score_arr[mask], **kwargs)

def get_valid_n_splits(y, desired=5):
    vc = pd.Series(y).value_counts(dropna=False)
    if len(vc) < 2:
        return 0
    return int(min(desired, vc.min()))

def safe_qcut(series, q, labels=None, duplicates="drop", prefix="Q"):
    """
    对 qcut 做稳健封装：
    - 允许重复值较多时自动减少 bin 数
    - labels 长度会自动与实际 bin 数匹配
    - 返回 object dtype 的 series，便于直接 groupby / display
    """
    s = pd.Series(series).copy()
    out = pd.Series(pd.NA, index=s.index, dtype="object")
    valid = s.dropna()
    if len(valid) == 0:
        return out

    x = valid
    cat = None
    try:
        cat = pd.qcut(x, q=q, duplicates=duplicates)
    except Exception:
        try:
            x_rank = x.rank(method="average", pct=True)
            cat = pd.qcut(x_rank, q=q, duplicates=duplicates)
        except Exception:
            try:
                n_bins = min(int(q), max(1, x.nunique()))
                x_rank = x.rank(method="average", pct=True)
                cat = pd.cut(x_rank, bins=n_bins, include_lowest=True, duplicates="drop")
            except Exception:
                return out

    if cat is None:
        return out

    n_bins = len(cat.cat.categories)

    if labels is not None:
        labels = list(labels)
        if len(labels) >= n_bins:
            new_labels = labels[:n_bins]
        else:
            new_labels = labels + [f"{prefix}{i+1}" for i in range(len(labels), n_bins)]
        cat = cat.cat.rename_categories(new_labels)
        out.loc[valid.index] = cat.astype(str)
    else:
        out.loc[valid.index] = cat.astype(str)

    return out

def bootstrap_ci(statistic_fn, n_obs, n_boot=500, alpha=0.05, rng=None):
    """
    Generic bootstrap CI.
    statistic_fn(indices) -> scalar
    自动过滤 nan / inf
    """
    if rng is None:
        rng = RNG

    stats_list = []
    if n_obs <= 1:
        return np.nan, np.nan, np.nan, np.nan

    for _ in range(n_boot):
        idx = rng.choice(n_obs, n_obs, replace=True)
        try:
            val = statistic_fn(idx)
        except Exception:
            val = np.nan
        if np.isfinite(val):
            stats_list.append(float(val))

    if len(stats_list) == 0:
        return np.nan, np.nan, np.nan, np.nan

    stats_arr = np.asarray(stats_list, dtype=float)
    lo = np.percentile(stats_arr, 100 * alpha / 2)
    hi = np.percentile(stats_arr, 100 * (1 - alpha / 2))
    return float(np.mean(stats_arr)), float(np.std(stats_arr, ddof=1)), float(lo), float(hi)

def get_xgb_device_params():
    """
    根据 xgboost 版本稳健设置 GPU / CPU 参数。
    xgboost>=2.0: device='cuda', tree_method='hist'
    xgboost<2.0:  tree_method='gpu_hist' / 'hist'
    """
    version_parts = xgb.__version__.split(".")
    try:
        major = int(version_parts[0])
        minor = int(version_parts[1])
    except Exception:
        major, minor = 1, 7

    if CFG["use_cuda"]:
        if major >= 2:
            return dict(device="cuda", tree_method="hist")
        else:
            return dict(tree_method="gpu_hist", predictor="gpu_predictor")
    else:
        return dict(tree_method="hist")

def make_xgb(task="binary", n_classes=2, smaller=False):
    params = dict(CFG["xgb_params"])
    if smaller:
        params.update(n_estimators=200, max_depth=4)

    params.update(get_xgb_device_params())
    params.update(random_state=CFG["seed"], n_jobs=-1)

    if task == "binary":
        return xgb.XGBClassifier(objective="binary:logistic", **params)
    else:
        return xgb.XGBClassifier(objective="multi:softprob", num_class=n_classes, **params)

class ConstantBinaryModel:
    """Fallback model for single-class training folds."""
    def __init__(self, p):
        self.p = float(np.clip(p, 1e-6, 1 - 1e-6))

    def fit(self, X, y):
        return self

    def predict_proba(self, X):
        n = len(X)
        return np.column_stack([
            np.full(n, 1.0 - self.p, dtype=float),
            np.full(n, self.p, dtype=float)
        ])

def fit_binary_model_safe(X_train, y_train, smaller=False):
    y_train = np.asarray(y_train).astype(int)
    y_train = y_train[np.isfinite(y_train)]
    uniq = np.unique(y_train)
    if len(uniq) < 2:
        p = float(uniq[0]) if len(uniq) == 1 else float(np.nanmean(y_train))
        return ConstantBinaryModel(p)
    m = make_xgb("binary", smaller=smaller)
    m.fit(X_train, y_train)
    return m

def impute_median(X):
    imp = SimpleImputer(strategy="median")
    return imp.fit_transform(X), imp

def oof_predict_proba(model_fn, X, y, n_splits=5, seed=2026):
    """OOF predicted probabilities using cross-fitting."""
    y = np.asarray(y)
    valid_splits = get_valid_n_splits(y, n_splits)
    if valid_splits < 2:
        raise ValueError("OOF 失败：类别样本太少，无法做 StratifiedKFold。")

    kf = StratifiedKFold(n_splits=valid_splits, shuffle=True, random_state=seed)
    oof = np.full(len(y), np.nan)

    for tr, va in kf.split(X, y):
        y_tr = y[tr]

        # 单类训练折：直接输出常数概率
        if len(np.unique(y_tr)) < 2:
            p = float(np.clip(y_tr[0], 1e-6, 1 - 1e-6))
            oof[va] = p
            continue

        m = model_fn()
        m.fit(X[tr], y_tr)
        proba = m.predict_proba(X[va])
        if proba.ndim == 2 and proba.shape[1] >= 2:
            oof[va] = proba[:, 1]
        else:
            oof[va] = proba.ravel()

    return oof

COLORS = {"dec": "#e74c3c", "same": "#95a5a6", "inc": "#2ecc71"}
ORDER = ["dec", "same", "inc"]

log("imports done")
log(f"xgboost version = {xgb.__version__}")

# %% Cell 3 — Load data
section("模块 A：数据加载、标签定义与样本结构")

df = pd.read_csv(CFG["data_path"], low_memory=False)
feat_df = pd.read_excel(CFG["feature_path"])

# 特征列名兼容
if "索引" in feat_df.columns:
    feature_col = "索引"
else:
    feature_col = feat_df.columns[0]
    log(f"[WARN] xlsx 中未找到 '索引' 列，改用第一列: {feature_col}")

feature_list = feat_df[feature_col].astype(str).unique().tolist()

# 剔除泄漏列
LEAK = {
    "first_af_credit", "delta_credit", "ratio", "log_ratio",
    "action", "action_raw", "default", "mob1_label7", "mob2_label7",
    "mob3_label7", "Y_30", "Y_60", "Y_90"
}
removed = [c for c in feature_list if c in LEAK]
feature_list = [c for c in feature_list if c not in LEAK]

missing = [c for c in feature_list if c not in df.columns]
for c in missing:
    df[c] = np.nan

FEATURES = [c for c in feature_list if c in df.columns]

log(f"df shape = {df.shape}")
log(f"xlsx 原始特征数 = {len(pd.Series(feat_df[feature_col]).dropna().astype(str).unique())}")
log(f"剔除泄漏列 = {removed}")
log(f"df 中缺失特征 = {len(missing)}")
log(f"最终主模型特征 X 维度 = {len(FEATURES)}")

# 确保数值型
for c in FEATURES:
    df[c] = safe_numeric(df[c])

valid_feats = [c for c in FEATURES if df[c].notna().sum() >= 100]
FEATURES = valid_feats
log(f"过滤后有效特征数 = {len(FEATURES)}")

# %% Cell 4 — Label & Treatment
subsection("A1. 违约标签 & Treatment 构造")

df["mob1_label7"] = safe_numeric(df.get("mob1_label7", pd.Series(dtype=float)))
df["mob2_label7"] = safe_numeric(df.get("mob2_label7", pd.Series(dtype=float)))
df["default"] = np.maximum(df["mob1_label7"].fillna(0), df["mob2_label7"].fillna(0)).astype(int)
Y_COL = "default"

bf_col, af_col = "first_bf_credit", "first_af_credit"
df[bf_col] = safe_numeric(df[bf_col])
df[af_col] = safe_numeric(df[af_col])

df["delta_credit"] = df[af_col] - df[bf_col]
df["T"] = np.where(
    np.isclose(df["delta_credit"], 0, atol=1e-6),
    0,
    np.where(df["delta_credit"] > 0, 1, -1)
)
df["T_label"] = df["T"].map({-1: "dec", 0: "same", 1: "inc"})

# 调额比例
df["delta_ratio"] = np.where(
    df[bf_col].abs() > 1,
    df["delta_credit"] / df[bf_col],
    np.nan
)

log(f"违约率 = {df[Y_COL].mean():.6f} (n={len(df)}, bad={df[Y_COL].sum()})")

tab0 = df.groupby("T_label").agg(
    n=(Y_COL, "count"),
    bad=(Y_COL, "sum"),
    rate=(Y_COL, "mean")
).reindex(ORDER)
show(tab0, "三组基础统计")

# 额度基础统计
subsection("A2. 额度变化统计")
credit_stats = df.groupby("T_label").agg(
    limit_before_mean=(bf_col, "mean"),
    limit_before_median=(bf_col, "median"),
    delta_mean=("delta_credit", "mean"),
    delta_median=("delta_credit", "median"),
    delta_ratio_mean=("delta_ratio", lambda x: x.dropna().mean()),
    delta_ratio_median=("delta_ratio", lambda x: x.dropna().median()),
).reindex(ORDER)
show(credit_stats, "额度变化统计 (by T)")

# %% Cell 5 — diff_days
subsection("A3. diff_days (调额后到下次消费时间)")
display(Markdown("*注意：diff_days 仅用于描述/分层控制，**不进入**主模型特征 X。*"))

has_diff_days = False
if "first_done_date" in df.columns and "second_done_date" in df.columns:
    df["first_done_date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["first_done_date"], errors="coerce")
    df["second_done_date"] = pd.to_datetime(df["second_done_date"], errors="coerce")
    df["diff_days"] = (df["second_done_date"] - df["first_done_date"]).dt.total_seconds() / 86400
    has_diff_days = df["diff_days"].notna().sum() > 100
    log(f"diff_days: 有效 = {df['diff_days'].notna().sum()}, 缺失率 = {df['diff_days'].isna().mean():.2%}")
else:
    log("[SKIP] first_done_date / second_done_date 不存在，跳过 diff_days 分析")

if has_diff_days:
    dd = df["diff_days"].dropna()
    log(
        f"diff_days 分布: mean={dd.mean():.1f}, median={dd.median():.1f}, "
        f"p25={dd.quantile(0.25):.1f}, p75={dd.quantile(0.75):.1f}, "
        f"p95={dd.quantile(0.95):.1f}"
    )

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4), dpi=CFG["dpi"])
    for tl in ORDER:
        sub = df.loc[df["T_label"] == tl, "diff_days"].dropna()
        if len(sub) > 10:
            sub_plot = sub.clip(upper=sub.quantile(0.99))
            axes[0].hist(
                sub_plot, bins=50, alpha=0.4, label=tl,
                color=COLORS[tl], density=True
            )
    axes[0].set_title(PT("diff_days 分布 (by T)", "Distribution of diff_days by treatment"))
    axes[0].set_xlabel("Days")
    axes[0].legend()
    axes[0].grid(alpha=0.3)

    bp_data = [df.loc[df["T_label"] == t, "diff_days"].dropna().values for t in ORDER]
    bp = axes[1].boxplot(bp_data, labels=ORDER, showfliers=False, patch_artist=True)
    for patch, t in zip(bp["boxes"], ORDER):
        patch.set_facecolor(COLORS[t])
        patch.set_alpha(0.5)
    axes[1].set_title(PT("diff_days 箱线图 (by T)", "Boxplot of diff_days by treatment"))
    axes[1].set_ylabel("Days")
    axes[1].grid(alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

    df["diff_days_bin"] = safe_qcut(
        df["diff_days"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
        q=5
    )

    tab_dd = df.groupby(["diff_days_bin", "T_label"], dropna=False)[Y_COL].agg(["mean", "count"]).reset_index()
    tab_dd.columns = ["diff_days_bin", "T", "rate", "n"]
    show(tab_dd.sort_values(["diff_days_bin", "T"]), "违约率 by diff_days 分位 × T")
else:
    df["diff_days"] = np.nan

# %% Cell 6 — 重复用户分析
subsection("A4. 重复用户 / 样本结构")

uid_col = "user_id" if "user_id" in df.columns else None
if uid_col:
    n_unique = df[uid_col].nunique()
    n_rows = len(df)
    log(f"user_id 唯一数 = {n_unique}, 行数 = {n_rows}, 比例 = {n_unique / n_rows:.4f}")

    uc = df[uid_col].value_counts()
    log(
        f"每用户记录数分布: mean={uc.mean():.2f}, median={uc.median():.0f}, "
        f"max={uc.max()}, p95={uc.quantile(0.95):.0f}"
    )

    # 修复这里的 reset_index 列名冲突
    user_occ_dist = (
        uc.value_counts()
        .sort_index()
        .rename_axis("出现次数")
        .reset_index(name="用户数")
    )
    show(user_occ_dist.head(15), "用户出现次数分布")

    df["user_record_count"] = df.groupby(uid_col)[uid_col].transform("count")
    df["is_first_record"] = df.groupby(uid_col).cumcount() == 0

    repeat_by_t = df.groupby("T_label")["user_record_count"].agg(
        mean_records="mean",
        pct_repeat=lambda x: (x > 1).mean()
    ).reindex(ORDER)
    show(repeat_by_t, "各组重复用户占比")
else:
    df["user_record_count"] = 1
    df["is_first_record"] = True
    log("[SKIP] user_id 列不存在")


# ================================================================
# 模块 B：时间统一性与 post-treatment exposure 诊断
# ================================================================
section("模块 B：Post-treatment Exposure (diff_days) 诊断")

if has_diff_days:
    subsection("B1. diff_days 按 T 的分位数对比")
    dd_pctiles = df.groupby("T_label")["diff_days"].describe(
        percentiles=[0.1, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 0.9]
    ).reindex(ORDER)
    show(dd_pctiles, "diff_days 描述统计 by T")

    subsection("B2. diff_days 分层后 inc vs same 违约率差异")
    df["dd_q3"] = safe_qcut(
        df["diff_days"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
        q=3,
        labels=["short", "mid", "long"]
    )

    dd_strat = (
        df[df["T"].isin([0, 1])]
        .groupby(["dd_q3", "T_label"], dropna=False)[Y_COL]
        .agg(["mean", "count"])
        .reset_index()
    )
    dd_strat.columns = ["dd_group", "T", "rate", "n"]
    show(dd_strat, "分层: inc vs same 违约率 by diff_days 三分组")

    for g in ["short", "mid", "long"]:
        sub = dd_strat[dd_strat["dd_group"] == g]
        r_inc = sub.loc[sub["T"] == "inc", "rate"].values
        r_same = sub.loc[sub["T"] == "same", "rate"].values
        if len(r_inc) > 0 and len(r_same) > 0:
            log(f"  {g}: inc={r_inc[0]:.6f}, same={r_same[0]:.6f}, diff={r_inc[0] - r_same[0]:.6f}")

    subsection("B3. 限制 diff_days ≤ P80 的子样本稳健性")
    if df["diff_days"].notna().sum() > 500:
        p80 = df["diff_days"].quantile(0.8)
        df_dd_trim = df[df["diff_days"] <= p80].copy()
        log(f"diff_days ≤ {p80:.1f}d 子样本: n={len(df_dd_trim)}")
        for t in ORDER:
            r = df_dd_trim.loc[df_dd_trim["T_label"] == t, Y_COL].mean()
            n = (df_dd_trim["T_label"] == t).sum()
            log(f"  T={t}: rate={r:.6f}, n={n}")
else:
    display(Markdown("*diff_days 不可用，模块 B 跳过。*"))

# ================================================================
# 模块 C：额度水平 × 调额比例/幅度 的局部分析
# ================================================================
section("模块 C：Treatment 细粒度分析（额度水平 × 调额比例）")

subsection("C1. 基线额度分组")
df["limit_q5"] = safe_qcut(
    df[bf_col].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=5
)
df["limit_q5_label"] = safe_qcut(
    df[bf_col].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=5,
    labels=["Q1_low", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5_high"]
)

subsection("C2. 调额比例分组（仅 inc / dec）")
inc_mask = df["T"] == 1
df.loc[inc_mask, "inc_ratio_bin"] = safe_qcut(
    df.loc[inc_mask, "delta_ratio"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=3,
    labels=["small_inc", "mid_inc", "large_inc"]
)

dec_mask = df["T"] == -1
df.loc[dec_mask, "dec_ratio_bin"] = safe_qcut(
    df.loc[dec_mask, "delta_ratio"].abs().rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=3,
    labels=["small_dec", "mid_dec", "large_dec"]
)

subsection("C3. 违约率热力图：baseline limit × T")
heat1 = (
    df.groupby(["limit_q5_label", "T_label"], dropna=False)[Y_COL]
    .agg(["mean", "count"])
    .reset_index()
)
heat1.columns = ["limit_bin", "T", "rate", "n"]
show(heat1.sort_values(["limit_bin", "T"]), "违约率 by limit分位 × T")

pivot1 = heat1.pivot(index="limit_bin", columns="T", values="rate")
for col in ORDER:
    if col not in pivot1.columns:
        pivot1[col] = np.nan
pivot1 = pivot1[ORDER]

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(7, 4), dpi=CFG["dpi"])
im = ax.imshow(pivot1.values, cmap="YlOrRd", aspect="auto")
ax.set_xticks(range(len(ORDER)))
ax.set_xticklabels(ORDER)
ax.set_yticks(range(len(pivot1)))
ax.set_yticklabels(pivot1.index, fontsize=8)

for i in range(len(pivot1)):
    for j in range(len(ORDER)):
        v = pivot1.values[i, j]
        if np.isfinite(v):
            ax.text(j, i, f"{v:.4f}", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=7)

plt.colorbar(im, ax=ax, label="Default rate")
ax.set_title(PT("违约率: baseline limit 分位 × Treatment",
                "Default rate: baseline limit quantile × treatment"))
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

subsection("C4. inc 内部：调额比例 × 额度水平")
inc_detail = (
    df[df["T"] == 1]
    .groupby(["limit_q5_label", "inc_ratio_bin"], dropna=False)[Y_COL]
    .agg(["mean", "count"])
    .reset_index()
)
inc_detail.columns = ["limit_bin", "ratio_bin", "rate", "n"]
show(inc_detail.sort_values(["limit_bin", "ratio_bin"]), "inc 组内违约率 by limit分位 × 调额比例")

subsection("C5. 局部 inc vs same 差异 (within limit bins)")
local_effects = []
for lb in pd.Series(df["limit_q5_label"]).dropna().unique():
    sub = df[(df["limit_q5_label"] == lb) & (df["T"].isin([0, 1]))]
    n_inc = (sub["T"] == 1).sum()
    n_same = (sub["T"] == 0).sum()
    if n_inc < 30 or n_same < 30:
        continue
    r_inc = sub.loc[sub["T"] == 1, Y_COL].mean()
    r_same = sub.loc[sub["T"] == 0, Y_COL].mean()
    local_effects.append({
        "limit_bin": lb,
        "n_inc": n_inc,
        "n_same": n_same,
        "rate_inc": r_inc,
        "rate_same": r_same,
        "raw_diff": r_inc - r_same
    })

if local_effects:
    le_df = pd.DataFrame(local_effects)
    show(le_df, "局部 inc vs same 原始差异 (by limit bin)")

# ================================================================
# 模块 D：Policy Model（用 X 预测 T）
# ================================================================
section("模块 D：Policy Model")

X_all = df[FEATURES].values
X_imp, imp_obj = impute_median(X_all)

subsection("D1. 主 Policy Model（仅用 X）")

# 二分类
df["T_binary"] = (df["T"] != 0).astype(int)
y_pol_bin = df["T_binary"].values

proba_pol_bin = oof_predict_proba(
    lambda: make_xgb("binary"),
    X_imp,
    y_pol_bin,
    n_splits=CFG["n_splits"],
    seed=CFG["seed"]
)
auc_pol_bin = safe_auc(y_pol_bin, proba_pol_bin)
log(f"Policy 二分类 AUC = {auc_pol_bin:.4f}")

# 三分类
y_pol_tri = df["T"].values + 1  # {-1,0,1} -> {0,1,2}
valid_tri_splits = get_valid_n_splits(y_pol_tri, CFG["n_splits"])
if valid_tri_splits < 2:
    raise ValueError("三分类 policy model 样本不足，无法 StratifiedKFold。")

clf_tri = make_xgb("multiclass", n_classes=3)
cv_tri = StratifiedKFold(valid_tri_splits, shuffle=True, random_state=CFG["seed"])

proba_pol_tri = cross_val_predict(
    clf_tri,
    X_imp,
    y_pol_tri,
    cv=cv_tri,
    method="predict_proba"
)
pred_tri = np.argmax(proba_pol_tri, axis=1)
auc_pol_tri = safe_auc(y_pol_tri, proba_pol_tri, multi_class="ovr", average="macro")
f1_pol_tri = f1_score(y_pol_tri, pred_tri, average="macro")
log(f"Policy 三分类 AUC(OVR) = {auc_pol_tri:.4f}, macro-F1 = {f1_pol_tri:.4f}")

cm = confusion_matrix(y_pol_tri, pred_tri, labels=[0, 1, 2])
show(
    pd.DataFrame(
        cm,
        index=["true_dec", "true_same", "true_inc"],
        columns=["pred_dec", "pred_same", "pred_inc"]
    ),
    "混淆矩阵"
)

# P(inc|X) propensity for later use
df["p_inc_X"] = proba_pol_tri[:, 2]
df["p_dec_X"] = proba_pol_tri[:, 0]

subsection("D2. Policy 预测 Top 特征")
clf_imp = make_xgb("multiclass", n_classes=3)
clf_imp.fit(X_imp, y_pol_tri)
imp_sr = pd.Series(clf_imp.feature_importances_, index=FEATURES).sort_values(ascending=False)
imp_df = imp_sr.head(20).reset_index()
imp_df.columns = ["feature", "importance"]
show(imp_df, "Top-20 特征 (预测 T)")

subsection("D3. 扩展 Policy Model（X + 历史代理变量）")
display(Markdown("*以下为**敏感性分析**，历史代理变量不属于原始模型 X。*"))

extra_cols = []
if uid_col and "user_record_count" in df.columns:
    extra_cols.append("user_record_count")
if has_diff_days:
    df["diff_days_filled"] = df["diff_days"].fillna(df["diff_days"].median())
    extra_cols.append("diff_days_filled")

if extra_cols:
    X_ext = np.hstack([X_imp, df[extra_cols].values])
    proba_ext = oof_predict_proba(
        lambda: make_xgb("binary"),
        X_ext,
        y_pol_bin,
        n_splits=CFG["n_splits"],
        seed=CFG["seed"]
    )
    auc_ext = safe_auc(y_pol_bin, proba_ext)
    log(f"扩展 Policy 二分类 AUC = {auc_ext:.4f} (vs 主模型 {auc_pol_bin:.4f}, Δ={auc_ext - auc_pol_bin:+.4f})")
    log(f"  新增变量: {extra_cols}")
else:
    log("无可用历史代理变量")

# ================================================================
# 模块 E：Risk Model 与局部模型失效诊断
# ================================================================
section("模块 E：Risk Model & 局部模型失效诊断")

y_true = df[Y_COL].values.astype(int)

subsection("E1. 主 Risk Model（全样本 OOF）")
proba_risk_oof = oof_predict_proba(
    lambda: make_xgb("binary"),
    X_imp,
    y_true,
    n_splits=CFG["n_splits"],
    seed=CFG["seed"]
)
df["pred_risk"] = proba_risk_oof

auc_all = safe_auc(y_true, proba_risk_oof)
prauc_all = average_precision_score(y_true, proba_risk_oof) if len(np.unique(y_true)) > 1 else np.nan
log(f"全样本 Risk Model OOF: AUC={auc_all:.4f}, PR-AUC={prauc_all:.4f}")

for tl in ORDER:
    m = df["T_label"] == tl
    if m.sum() > 50 and y_true[m].sum() > 3 and (y_true[m] == 0).sum() > 3:
        a = safe_auc(y_true[m], proba_risk_oof[m])
        log(f"  T={tl}: AUC={a:.4f}, n={m.sum()}, bad={y_true[m].sum()}")

subsection("E2. Same-only Baseline Model（★关键分析★）")
display(Markdown("""
训练仅在 `T=0 (same)` 组上的违约模型，作为 untreated baseline risk 近似。  
然后外推到 `inc` 和 `dec` 组，检查 residual (actual - predicted) 的差异。

如果 `inc` 组的 excess residual（超出 `same` 组 residual 的部分）仍然为正，  
则更倾向于 treatment effect 而非纯粹的 model failure。
"""))

same_mask = df["T"] == 0
X_same = X_imp[same_mask]
y_same = y_true[same_mask]

valid_same_splits = get_valid_n_splits(y_same, CFG["n_splits"])
if valid_same_splits < 2:
    raise ValueError("same-only baseline model 样本不足，无法交叉拟合。")

same_oof = np.full(same_mask.sum(), np.nan)
kf = StratifiedKFold(valid_same_splits, shuffle=True, random_state=CFG["seed"])
same_model_list = []

for tr, va in kf.split(X_same, y_same):
    m = fit_binary_model_safe(X_same[tr], y_same[tr], smaller=False)
    same_oof[va] = m.predict_proba(X_same[va])[:, 1]
    same_model_list.append(m)

# 对全样本平均预测
pred_same_model = np.mean([m.predict_proba(X_imp)[:, 1] for m in same_model_list], axis=0)
df["pred_same_model"] = pred_same_model

# Residuals
df["resid_full"] = df[Y_COL] - df["pred_risk"]
df["resid_same_model"] = df[Y_COL] - df["pred_same_model"]

resid_summary = df.groupby("T_label").agg(
    n=(Y_COL, "count"),
    actual_rate=(Y_COL, "mean"),
    pred_full=("pred_risk", "mean"),
    pred_same_model=("pred_same_model", "mean"),
    resid_full=("resid_full", "mean"),
    resid_same_model=("resid_same_model", "mean"),
).reindex(ORDER)
show(resid_summary, "★ 各组 Residual 对比 (full model vs same-only model)")

same_base_resid = resid_summary.loc["same", "resid_same_model"]
for tl in ["inc", "dec"]:
    excess = resid_summary.loc[tl, "resid_same_model"] - same_base_resid
    log(f"  {tl} excess residual (vs same baseline) = {excess:.6f}")

subsection("E3. 局部 Residual 分析（by risk score decile × T）")
df["risk_decile"] = safe_qcut(
    df["pred_risk"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=10
)

local_resid = df.groupby(["risk_decile", "T_label"], dropna=False).agg(
    n=(Y_COL, "count"),
    actual=(Y_COL, "mean"),
    pred_full=("pred_risk", "mean"),
    pred_same_m=("pred_same_model", "mean"),
    resid_same_m=("resid_same_model", "mean"),
).reset_index()
show(local_resid.sort_values(["risk_decile", "T_label"]), "局部 Residual by Risk Decile × T")

subsection("E4. 局部 Residual 分析（by P(inc|X) quintile × T）")
df["p_inc_q5"] = safe_qcut(
    df["p_inc_X"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=5
)

local_resid2 = df.groupby(["p_inc_q5", "T_label"], dropna=False).agg(
    n=(Y_COL, "count"),
    actual=(Y_COL, "mean"),
    pred_same_m=("pred_same_model", "mean"),
    resid_same_m=("resid_same_model", "mean"),
).reset_index()
show(local_resid2.sort_values(["p_inc_q5", "T_label"]), "局部 Residual by P(inc|X) 分位 × T")

subsection("E5. Same-model Calibration 对比图")
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(15, 4), dpi=CFG["dpi"])
for ax, tl in zip(axes, ORDER):
    m = df["T_label"] == tl
    sub = df[m].copy()
    if len(sub) < 100 or sub[Y_COL].sum() < 3:
        ax.set_title(f"T={tl} (insufficient data)")
        continue

    sub["pred_bin"] = safe_qcut(
        sub["pred_same_model"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
        q=10
    )

    cal = sub.groupby("pred_bin", dropna=False).agg(
        pred_mean=("pred_same_model", "mean"),
        obs_rate=(Y_COL, "mean"),
        n=(Y_COL, "count")
    ).reset_index()

    ax.scatter(
        cal["pred_mean"], cal["obs_rate"],
        s=np.maximum(cal["n"] / 3, 10),
        alpha=0.7,
        color=COLORS[tl]
    )
    lim = max(cal["pred_mean"].max(), cal["obs_rate"].max()) * 1.3
    lim = max(lim, 1e-3)
    ax.plot([0, lim], [0, lim], "k--", alpha=0.4)
    ax.set_title(f"Same-model calibration: T={tl}")
    ax.set_xlabel("Predicted (same-model)")
    ax.set_ylabel("Observed")
    ax.grid(alpha=0.3)

plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# ================================================================
# 模块 E-extra：稳定性机制分析
# ================================================================
subsection("E6. 稳定性机制：T=0 是否因为用户状态稳定？")

vol_kw = ["delta", "change", "vol", "std", "var", "fluct", "diff", "gap"]
vol_feats = [c for c in FEATURES if any(k in c.lower() for k in vol_kw)]
log(f"波动性相关特征: {len(vol_feats)} 个")

if len(vol_feats) >= 3:
    z_parts = []
    for c in vol_feats[:30]:
        x = df[c].values.astype(float)
        mu, sd = np.nanmean(x), np.nanstd(x)
        if np.isfinite(sd) and sd > 0:
            z_parts.append((x - mu) / sd)

    if z_parts:
        df["instability"] = np.nanmean(np.vstack(z_parts), axis=0)
        df["stab_q3"] = safe_qcut(
            df["instability"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
            q=3,
            labels=["stable", "mid", "unstable"]
        )

        stab_t = pd.crosstab(df["stab_q3"], df["T_label"], normalize="index")
        for c in ORDER:
            if c not in stab_t.columns:
                stab_t[c] = 0.0
        stab_t = stab_t[ORDER]
        show(stab_t, "P(T | stability)")

        stab_rate = df.groupby(["stab_q3", "T_label"], dropna=False)[Y_COL].agg(["mean", "count"]).reset_index()
        stab_rate.columns = ["stability", "T", "rate", "n"]
        show(stab_rate, "违约率 by stability × T")

        log("控制稳定性后 inc vs same 差异:")
        for sv in ["stable", "mid", "unstable"]:
            sub = df[(df["stab_q3"] == sv) & df["T"].isin([0, 1])]
            if (sub["T"] == 1).sum() < 30 or (sub["T"] == 0).sum() < 30:
                continue
            ri = sub.loc[sub["T"] == 1, Y_COL].mean()
            rs = sub.loc[sub["T"] == 0, Y_COL].mean()
            log(f"  {sv}: inc={ri:.6f}, same={rs:.6f}, diff={ri - rs:.6f}")

        fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 4), dpi=CFG["dpi"])
        stab_t.plot(kind="bar", ax=axes[0], color=[COLORS[c] for c in ORDER])
        axes[0].set_title("P(T | stability)")
        axes[0].set_ylabel("Share")
        axes[0].grid(axis="y", alpha=0.3)

        pv = stab_rate.pivot(index="stability", columns="T", values="rate")
        for c in ORDER:
            if c not in pv.columns:
                pv[c] = np.nan
        pv = pv[ORDER]
        pv.plot(kind="bar", ax=axes[1], color=[COLORS[c] for c in ORDER])
        axes[1].set_title(PT("违约率 by stability × T", "Default rate by stability × treatment"))
        axes[1].set_ylabel("Default rate")
        axes[1].grid(axis="y", alpha=0.3)

        plt.tight_layout()
        plt.show()

# ================================================================
# 模块 F：Effect Estimation（含 bootstrap CI + forest plot）
# ================================================================
section("模块 F：因果效应估计（含 bootstrap 置信区间）")

def run_effect_estimation(df_sub, features, y_col, label, n_boot=None):
    """对 df_sub 中 W=1 vs W=0 做完整的因果效应估计。返回 summary DataFrame。"""
    if n_boot is None:
        n_boot = CFG["n_boot"]

    W = df_sub["W"].values.astype(int)
    Y = df_sub[y_col].values.astype(int)
    X = df_sub[features].values
    X_f, _ = impute_median(X)

    n = len(df_sub)
    n1, n0 = W.sum(), (1 - W).sum()
    if n1 < 20 or n0 < 20:
        raise ValueError(f"{label}: treatment / control 样本过少，无法估计。")

    results = []

    # --- Raw ---
    raw_t = Y[W == 1].mean()
    raw_c = Y[W == 0].mean()
    raw_diff = raw_t - raw_c

    def raw_fn(idx):
        w = W[idx]
        y = Y[idx]
        if (w == 1).sum() < 5 or (w == 0).sum() < 5:
            return np.nan
        return y[w == 1].mean() - y[w == 0].mean()

    _, se_raw, lo_raw, hi_raw = bootstrap_ci(raw_fn, n, n_boot)
    results.append({"method": "Raw", "ATE": raw_diff, "SE": se_raw, "CI_lo": lo_raw, "CI_hi": hi_raw})

    # --- Propensity Score (OOF) ---
    ps_oof = oof_predict_proba(
        lambda: make_xgb("binary", smaller=True),
        X_f,
        W,
        n_splits=CFG["n_splits"],
        seed=CFG["seed"]
    )
    ps_oof = clip_prob(ps_oof, lo=CFG["ps_trim"][0], hi=CFG["ps_trim"][1])

    # --- IPW ---
    def ipw_fn(idx):
        w, y, ps = W[idx], Y[idx], ps_oof[idx]
        if (w == 1).sum() < 5 or (w == 0).sum() < 5:
            return np.nan
        w1 = w / ps
        w0 = (1 - w) / (1 - ps)
        return np.sum(w1 * y) / np.sum(w1) - np.sum(w0 * y) / np.sum(w0)

    ate_ipw = ipw_fn(np.arange(n))
    _, se_ipw, lo_ipw, hi_ipw = bootstrap_ci(ipw_fn, n, n_boot)
    results.append({"method": "IPW", "ATE": ate_ipw, "SE": se_ipw, "CI_lo": lo_ipw, "CI_hi": hi_ipw})

    # --- Overlap Weighting ---
    def ow_boot(idx):
        w, y, ps = W[idx], Y[idx], ps_oof[idx]
        m1 = w == 1
        m0 = w == 0
        if m1.sum() < 5 or m0.sum() < 5:
            return np.nan
        return np.average(y[m1], weights=(1 - ps[m1])) - np.average(y[m0], weights=ps[m0])

    m1 = W == 1
    m0 = W == 0
    ate_ow = np.average(Y[m1], weights=(1 - ps_oof[m1])) - np.average(Y[m0], weights=ps_oof[m0])
    _, se_ow, lo_ow, hi_ow = bootstrap_ci(ow_boot, n, n_boot)
    results.append({"method": "Overlap Wt", "ATE": ate_ow, "SE": se_ow, "CI_lo": lo_ow, "CI_hi": hi_ow})

    # --- PSM ---
    idx_t = np.where(m1)[0]
    idx_c = np.where(m0)[0]

    nn = NearestNeighbors(n_neighbors=1, metric="euclidean")
    nn.fit(ps_oof[m0].reshape(-1, 1))
    dists, indices = nn.kneighbors(ps_oof[m1].reshape(-1, 1))
    matched_c = idx_c[indices.flatten()]

    caliper = 0.05
    within = dists.flatten() < caliper
    n_matched = within.sum()

    if n_matched > 50:
        y_mt = Y[idx_t[within]]
        y_mc = Y[matched_c[within]]
        ate_psm = y_mt.mean() - y_mc.mean()

        def psm_boot(idx):
            return y_mt[idx].mean() - y_mc[idx].mean()

        _, se_psm, lo_psm, hi_psm = bootstrap_ci(psm_boot, n_matched, n_boot)
        results.append({
            "method": f"PSM(n={n_matched})",
            "ATE": ate_psm,
            "SE": se_psm,
            "CI_lo": lo_psm,
            "CI_hi": hi_psm
        })
    else:
        results.append({"method": "PSM", "ATE": np.nan, "SE": np.nan, "CI_lo": np.nan, "CI_hi": np.nan})

    # --- DML ---
    valid_splits = get_valid_n_splits(W, CFG["n_splits"])
    if valid_splits < 2:
        W_res = np.full(n, np.nan)
        Y_res = np.full(n, np.nan)
        theta_dml = np.nan
        se_dml = lo_dml = hi_dml = np.nan
    else:
        kf = StratifiedKFold(valid_splits, shuffle=True, random_state=CFG["seed"])
        W_res = np.zeros(n)
        Y_res = np.zeros(n)

        for tr, va in kf.split(X_f, W):
            mw = fit_binary_model_safe(X_f[tr], W[tr], smaller=True)
            W_res[va] = W[va] - mw.predict_proba(X_f[va])[:, 1]

            my = fit_binary_model_safe(X_f[tr], Y[tr], smaller=True)
            Y_res[va] = Y[va] - my.predict_proba(X_f[va])[:, 1]

        if np.allclose(W_res, 0):
            theta_dml = np.nan
            se_dml = lo_dml = hi_dml = np.nan
        else:
            theta_dml = lstsq(W_res.reshape(-1, 1), Y_res, rcond=None)[0][0]

            def dml_boot(idx):
                wr = W_res[idx]
                yr = Y_res[idx]
                if len(wr) < 10 or np.allclose(wr, 0):
                    return np.nan
                return lstsq(wr.reshape(-1, 1), yr, rcond=None)[0][0]

            _, se_dml, lo_dml, hi_dml = bootstrap_ci(dml_boot, n, n_boot)

    results.append({"method": "DML", "ATE": theta_dml, "SE": se_dml, "CI_lo": lo_dml, "CI_hi": hi_dml})

    res_df = pd.DataFrame(results)
    z = res_df["ATE"] / res_df["SE"].replace(0, np.nan)
    res_df["p_value"] = 2 * (1 - stats.norm.cdf(np.abs(z)))
    res_df["sig"] = np.where(
        res_df["p_value"] < 0.01, "***",
        np.where(res_df["p_value"] < 0.05, "**",
                 np.where(res_df["p_value"] < 0.1, "*", ""))
    )
    res_df.insert(0, "comparison", label)
    return res_df, W_res, Y_res, ps_oof

# --------------------------------------------------
subsection("F1. 升额 (inc) vs 不变 (same)")
df_is = df[df["T"].isin([0, 1])].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
df_is["W"] = (df_is["T"] == 1).astype(int)

res_inc, Wres_inc, Yres_inc, ps_inc = run_effect_estimation(
    df_is, FEATURES, Y_COL, "inc_vs_same"
)
show(res_inc, "★ 升额 vs 不变：因果效应估计（含 95% CI）")

subsection("F2. 降额 (dec) vs 不变 (same)")
df_ds = df[df["T"].isin([-1, 0])].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
df_ds["W"] = (df_ds["T"] == -1).astype(int)

res_dec, Wres_dec, Yres_dec, ps_dec = run_effect_estimation(
    df_ds, FEATURES, Y_COL, "dec_vs_same"
)
show(res_dec, "★ 降额 vs 不变：因果效应估计（含 95% CI）")

# --------------------------------------------------
subsection("F3. Forest Plot")
all_res = pd.concat([res_inc, res_dec], ignore_index=True)

fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6), dpi=CFG["dpi"])

plot_df = all_res.copy()
plot_df = plot_df[
    plot_df["ATE"].notna() &
    plot_df["CI_lo"].notna() &
    plot_df["CI_hi"].notna()
].reset_index(drop=True)

labels_plot = [f"{r['comparison']} | {r['method']}" for _, r in plot_df.iterrows()]
y_pos = np.arange(len(plot_df))[::-1]

plot_df["xerr_left"] = (plot_df["ATE"] - plot_df["CI_lo"]).clip(lower=0)
plot_df["xerr_right"] = (plot_df["CI_hi"] - plot_df["ATE"]).clip(lower=0)

for i, (_, r) in enumerate(plot_df.iterrows()):
    c = "#2ecc71" if "inc" in r["comparison"] else "#e74c3c"
    ax.errorbar(
        x=r["ATE"],
        y=y_pos[i],
        xerr=np.array([[r["xerr_left"]], [r["xerr_right"]]]),
        fmt="o",
        capsize=3,
        markersize=5,
        color=c,
        ecolor=c
    )

ax.axvline(0, color="black", linewidth=0.8, linestyle="--")
ax.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax.set_yticklabels(labels_plot, fontsize=8)
ax.set_xlabel("ATE (additional default risk)")
ax.set_title("Forest plot: effect estimates with 95% CI")
ax.grid(axis="x", alpha=0.3)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()

# --------------------------------------------------
subsection("F4. 局部 Effect (DML CATE by subgroup)")

df_is["W_res"] = Wres_inc
df_is["Y_res"] = Yres_inc

# 修复：之前错误地用了 FEATURES[0]，现在改为 pred_risk
df_is["pred_risk_q5"] = safe_qcut(
    df_is["pred_risk"].rank(pct=True, method="average"),
    q=5,
    labels=["Q1_low", "Q2", "Q3", "Q4", "Q5_high"]
)

cate_rows = []

# by limit quintile
for lb, grp in df_is.groupby("limit_q5_label", dropna=True):
    wr, yr = grp["W_res"].values, grp["Y_res"].values
    if len(wr) < 100 or np.allclose(wr, 0):
        continue
    theta = lstsq(wr.reshape(-1, 1), yr, rcond=None)[0][0]

    def boot_fn(idx):
        wri = wr[idx]
        yri = yr[idx]
        if len(wri) < 20 or np.allclose(wri, 0):
            return np.nan
        return lstsq(wri.reshape(-1, 1), yri, rcond=None)[0][0]

    _, se, lo, hi = bootstrap_ci(boot_fn, len(wr), min(200, CFG["n_boot"]))
    cate_rows.append({
        "subgroup": str(lb), "dim": "limit", "n": len(grp),
        "CATE": theta, "SE": se, "CI_lo": lo, "CI_hi": hi
    })

# by risk score
for rq, grp in df_is.groupby("pred_risk_q5", dropna=True):
    wr, yr = grp["W_res"].values, grp["Y_res"].values
    if len(wr) < 100 or np.allclose(wr, 0):
        continue
    theta = lstsq(wr.reshape(-1, 1), yr, rcond=None)[0][0]

    def boot_fn(idx):
        wri = wr[idx]
        yri = yr[idx]
        if len(wri) < 20 or np.allclose(wri, 0):
            return np.nan
        return lstsq(wri.reshape(-1, 1), yri, rcond=None)[0][0]

    _, se, lo, hi = bootstrap_ci(boot_fn, len(wr), min(200, CFG["n_boot"]))
    cate_rows.append({
        "subgroup": str(rq), "dim": "risk_score", "n": len(grp),
        "CATE": theta, "SE": se, "CI_lo": lo, "CI_hi": hi
    })

# by diff_days
if has_diff_days and "dd_q3" in df_is.columns:
    for dg, grp in df_is.groupby("dd_q3", dropna=True):
        wr, yr = grp["W_res"].values, grp["Y_res"].values
        if len(wr) < 100 or np.allclose(wr, 0):
            continue
        theta = lstsq(wr.reshape(-1, 1), yr, rcond=None)[0][0]

        def boot_fn(idx):
            wri = wr[idx]
            yri = yr[idx]
            if len(wri) < 20 or np.allclose(wri, 0):
                return np.nan
            return lstsq(wri.reshape(-1, 1), yri, rcond=None)[0][0]

        _, se, lo, hi = bootstrap_ci(boot_fn, len(wr), min(200, CFG["n_boot"]))
        cate_rows.append({
            "subgroup": str(dg), "dim": "diff_days", "n": len(grp),
            "CATE": theta, "SE": se, "CI_lo": lo, "CI_hi": hi
        })

if cate_rows:
    cate_df = pd.DataFrame(cate_rows)
    show(cate_df, "局部 CATE (DML, inc vs same) by 多维度")

    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, max(4, len(cate_df) * 0.35)), dpi=CFG["dpi"])
    y_pos = np.arange(len(cate_df))[::-1]
    ax.errorbar(
        cate_df["CATE"], y_pos,
        xerr=[cate_df["CATE"] - cate_df["CI_lo"], cate_df["CI_hi"] - cate_df["CATE"]],
        fmt="s", capsize=3, markersize=4, color="#2ecc71"
    )
    ax.axvline(0, color="black", linewidth=0.8, linestyle="--")
    ax.set_yticks(y_pos)
    ax.set_yticklabels(
        [f"[{r['dim']}] {r['subgroup']} (n={r['n']})" for _, r in cate_df.iterrows()],
        fontsize=7
    )
    ax.set_xlabel("CATE")
    ax.set_title("Local treatment effect forest plot (inc vs same)")
    ax.grid(axis="x", alpha=0.3)
    plt.tight_layout()
    plt.show()

# ================================================================
# 模块 G：重复用户 & 稳健性分析
# ================================================================
section("模块 G：稳健性分析")

subsection("G1. 仅首次记录子样本")
display(Markdown("*目的：排除重复用户 / 动态规则对结论的污染。*"))

if "is_first_record" in df.columns and df["is_first_record"].sum() > 1000:
    df_first = df[df["is_first_record"]].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
    log(f"首次记录子样本: n={len(df_first)}, bad={df_first[Y_COL].sum()}")

    for tl in ORDER:
        m = df_first["T_label"] == tl
        log(f"  T={tl}: n={m.sum()}, rate={df_first.loc[m, Y_COL].mean():.6f}")

    df_first_is = df_first[df_first["T"].isin([0, 1])].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
    df_first_is["W"] = (df_first_is["T"] == 1).astype(int)

    if df_first_is["W"].sum() > 50 and (1 - df_first_is["W"]).sum() > 50:
        res_first, _, _, _ = run_effect_estimation(
            df_first_is, FEATURES, Y_COL, "inc_vs_same (首次记录)"
        )
        show(res_first, "★ 首次记录子样本: 升额 vs 不变 效应估计")
    else:
        log("首次记录子样本样本量不足, 跳过效应估计")
else:
    log("is_first_record 不可用或样本太少, 跳过")

subsection("G2. diff_days 窗口限制稳健性")
if has_diff_days:
    for threshold_pct in [0.5, 0.8]:
        thr = df["diff_days"].quantile(threshold_pct)
        df_sub = df[(df["diff_days"] <= thr) & df["T"].isin([0, 1])].copy().reset_index(drop=True)
        df_sub["W"] = (df_sub["T"] == 1).astype(int)
        if df_sub["W"].sum() < 50 or (1 - df_sub["W"]).sum() < 50:
            log(f"diff_days ≤ P{int(threshold_pct * 100)}: 样本不足")
            continue
        res_dd, _, _, _ = run_effect_estimation(
            df_sub, FEATURES, Y_COL,
            f"inc_vs_same (dd≤P{int(threshold_pct * 100)}={thr:.0f}d)",
            n_boot=200
        )
        show(
            res_dd[[c for c in res_dd.columns if c != "comparison"]].assign(
                sample=f"dd≤P{int(threshold_pct * 100)}"
            ),
            f"diff_days ≤ P{int(threshold_pct * 100)} 稳健性"
        )
else:
    log("diff_days 不可用, 跳过")

# ================================================================
# 最终结论
# ================================================================
section("模块 H：结构化总结")

display(Markdown("""
> **解释边界声明**：
> - 本分析不包含真实历史预测分数 Ŷ，因此是 PfP 框架下的 reduced-form special case
> - Treatment effect 的识别依赖 selection-on-observables 假设，不能宣称完全解决未观测混杂
> - diff_days、user_record_count 等变量仅用于分析/控制，未进入主模型 X
> - Policy 三分类 AUC 若明显低于 1，意味着并非全部 policy 方差都能被 X 解释，存在遗漏变量风险
"""))

subsection("H1. 关键数字汇总")
key_numbers = {
    "总样本": len(df),
    "违约率": f"{df[Y_COL].mean():.4%}",
    "inc / same / dec": f"{(df['T'] == 1).mean():.1%} / {(df['T'] == 0).mean():.1%} / {(df['T'] == -1).mean():.1%}",
    "Risk Model OOF AUC": f"{auc_all:.4f}",
    "Policy 三分类 AUC": f"{auc_pol_tri:.4f}",
}
show(pd.DataFrame(list(key_numbers.items()), columns=["指标", "值"]), "关键数字")

subsection("H2. 八大问题回答")

answers = []

# Q1
dec_raw = res_dec.loc[res_dec["method"] == "Raw", "ATE"].values[0]
dec_ow_vals = res_dec.loc[res_dec["method"] == "Overlap Wt", "ATE"].values
dec_ow = dec_ow_vals[0] if len(dec_ow_vals) else np.nan
dec_shrink = 1 - abs(dec_ow) / abs(dec_raw) if np.isfinite(dec_ow) and abs(dec_raw) > 1e-8 else np.nan
answers.append((
    "Q1. dec 组高风险在多大程度上是 selection？",
    f"Raw diff={dec_raw:.6f} → Overlap Wt={dec_ow:.6f}，缩小 {dec_shrink:.0%}。"
    f"降额组高违约主要更像 selection effect（系统识别到高风险后降额）。"
))

# Q2
inc_dml = res_inc.loc[res_inc["method"] == "DML", "ATE"].values[0]
inc_dml_lo = res_inc.loc[res_inc["method"] == "DML", "CI_lo"].values[0]
inc_dml_hi = res_inc.loc[res_inc["method"] == "DML", "CI_hi"].values[0]
inc_all_pos = bool((res_inc["ATE"].dropna() > 0).all())
answers.append((
    "Q2. inc 组高风险在多大程度上是 treatment effect？",
    f"可计算的方法中方向是否全部为正：{inc_all_pos}；DML ATE={inc_dml:.6f}，95%CI=[{inc_dml_lo:.6f},{inc_dml_hi:.6f}]。"
    f"{'CI 不含零，统计显著。' if np.isfinite(inc_dml_lo) and inc_dml_lo > 0 else 'CI 含零或不可用。'}"
    f"若控制 X 后效应不降反升，则不支持纯 selection 解释。"
))

# Q3
if has_diff_days:
    answers.append((
        "Q3. diff_days 是否改变理解？",
        "请参见模块 B 的分层分析结果。若 effect 在 short / mid / long diff_days 中方向一致，则 exposure timing 不是唯一混杂源。"
    ))
else:
    answers.append(("Q3. diff_days 是否改变理解？", "diff_days 数据不可用，无法评估。"))

# Q4
if uid_col and "is_first_record" in df.columns:
    answers.append((
        "Q4. 重复用户/动态规则是否影响结论？",
        "请参见模块 G1 的首次记录子样本结果。若结论方向一致，则重复用户影响有限。"
    ))
else:
    answers.append(("Q4. 重复用户/动态规则是否影响结论？", "user_id 数据不可用，无法评估。"))

# Q5
answers.append((
    "Q5. Effect 是否集中在某些局部区域？",
    "参见模块 F4 的 CATE 分析，以及模块 C 的额度水平 × 调额比例局部分析。"
))

# Q6
auc_parts = []
for tl in ORDER:
    m = df["T_label"] == tl
    if m.sum() > 50 and y_true[m].sum() > 3 and (y_true[m] == 0).sum() > 3:
        a = safe_auc(y_true[m], proba_risk_oof[m])
        auc_parts.append(f"T={tl}: AUC={a:.4f}")
inc_auc_str = " | ".join(auc_parts)
answers.append((
    "Q6. inc 组 AUC 较低是否支持 local model failure？",
    f"分组 AUC: {inc_auc_str}。"
    f"inc 组 AUC 若只是略低但仍很高，则不支持系统性模型失效。"
    f"需结合 Residual 分析判断是否仅在局部 subgroup 存在 blind spot。"
))

# Q7
excess_inc = resid_summary.loc["inc", "resid_same_model"] - resid_summary.loc["same", "resid_same_model"]
answers.append((
    "Q7. Same-model anchor 下 inc 是否仍有 excess risk？",
    f"inc 的 same-model excess residual = {excess_inc:.6f}。"
    f"{'为正，支持 treatment effect。' if excess_inc > 0.001 else '接近零或为负。'}"
))

# Q8
answers.append((
    "Q8. 最支持的机制解释是什么？",
    "综合证据：(1) dec 组更像 selection effect 为主；"
    "(2) inc 组可能存在真实的 treatment effect signal；"
    "(3) local model failure 需要结合局部 residual / propensity overlap 才能判断；"
    "(4) 仍不能完全排除 policy 中未观测规则带来的遗漏变量偏差。"
))

for q, a in answers:
    display(Markdown(f"**{q}**\n\n{a}\n"))

log("ALL DONE ✅")

[15:26:28] imports done
[15:26:28] xgboost version = 3.0.5

以下为敏感性分析，历史代理变量不属于原始模型 X。

模块 E：Risk Model & 局部模型失效诊断¶

E1. 主 Risk Model（全样本 OOF）¶

[15:27:41] 全样本 Risk Model OOF: AUC=0.9421, PR-AUC=0.6664
[15:27:41]   T=dec: AUC=0.9451, n=4567, bad=102
[15:27:41]   T=same: AUC=0.9544, n=7938, bad=106
[15:27:41]   T=inc: AUC=0.9317, n=9682, bad=162

E2. Same-only Baseline Model（★关键分析★）¶

训练仅在 T=0 (same) 组上的违约模型，作为 untreated baseline risk 近似。
然后外推到 inc 和 dec 组，检查 residual (actual - predicted) 的差异。

如果 inc 组的 excess residual（超出 same 组 residual 的部分）仍然为正，
则更倾向于 treatment effect 而非纯粹的 model failure。

★ 各组 Residual 对比 (full model vs same-only model)

n actual_rate pred_full pred_same_model resid_full resid_same_model
T_label
dec 4567 0.022334 0.012062 0.005600 0.010272 0.016734
same 7938 0.013353 0.009427 0.011775 0.003926 0.001579
inc 9682 0.016732 0.007770 0.003704 0.008962 0.013028 
[15:27:48]   inc excess residual (vs same baseline) = 0.011449
[15:27:48]   dec excess residual (vs same baseline) = 0.015156

模块 H：结构化总结¶

解释边界声明：

  • 本分析不包含真实历史预测分数 Ŷ，因此是 PfP 框架下的 reduced-form special case
  • Treatment effect 的识别依赖 selection-on-observables 假设，不能宣称完全解决未观测混杂
  • diff_days、user_record_count 等变量仅用于分析/控制，未进入主模型 X
  • Policy 三分类 AUC 若明显低于 1，意味着并非全部 policy 方差都能被 X 解释，存在遗漏变量风险

H1. 关键数字汇总¶

关键数字

指标 值
0 总样本 22187
1 违约率 1.6676%
2 inc / same / dec 43.6% / 35.8% / 20.6%
3 Risk Model OOF AUC 0.9421
4 Policy 三分类 AUC 0.7766

H2. 八大问题回答¶

Q1. dec 组高风险在多大程度上是 selection？

Raw diff=0.008981 → Overlap Wt=0.005223，缩小 42%。降额组高违约主要更像 selection effect（系统识别到高风险后降额）。

Q2. inc 组高风险在多大程度上是 treatment effect？

可计算的方法中方向是否全部为正：True；DML ATE=0.005453，95%CI=[0.001951,0.008963]。CI 不含零，统计显著。若控制 X 后效应不降反升，则不支持纯 selection 解释。

Q3. diff_days 是否改变理解？

请参见模块 B 的分层分析结果。若 effect 在 short / mid / long diff_days 中方向一致，则 exposure timing 不是唯一混杂源。

Q4. 重复用户/动态规则是否影响结论？

请参见模块 G1 的首次记录子样本结果。若结论方向一致，则重复用户影响有限。

Q5. Effect 是否集中在某些局部区域？

参见模块 F4 的 CATE 分析，以及模块 C 的额度水平 × 调额比例局部分析。

Q6. inc 组 AUC 较低是否支持 local model failure？

分组 AUC: T=dec: AUC=0.9451 | T=same: AUC=0.9544 | T=inc: AUC=0.9317。inc 组 AUC 若只是略低但仍很高，则不支持系统性模型失效。需结合 Residual 分析判断是否仅在局部 subgroup 存在 blind spot。

Q7. Same-model anchor 下 inc 是否仍有 excess risk？

inc 的 same-model excess residual = 0.011449。为正，支持 treatment effect。

Q8. 最支持的机制解释是什么？

综合证据：(1) dec 组更像 selection effect 为主；(2) inc 组可能存在真实的 treatment effect signal；(3) local model failure 需要结合局部 residual / propensity overlap 才能判断；(4) 仍不能完全排除 policy 中未观测规则带来的遗漏变量偏差。

[15:29:15] ALL DONE ✅
